title: WOODBURN FAMILY YMCA PROGRAMS - 211info
text: WOODBURN FAMILY YMCA WOODBURN FAMILY YMCA PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth and adult sports in collaboration with Woodburn Recreation and Parks. Some of the activities provided are youth basketball, track and field, T-Ball, summer weekly clinics, and volleyball. Also offers an adult basketball league in the spring and fall. Volunteer opportunities are available. 190 Oak Street Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: -Unrestricted; most activities are for youth ages 3-6th grade, and an adult basketball league -Volunteer coaches are required to complete paperwork before season starts Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 980-2417 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 980-2417 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: -Ages 3-5: $40 per sport season -Kindergarten-6th grade: $85 per sport season -Adult league: Varies by sport DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Woodburn Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WOODBURN FAMILY YMCA
